title: Zombie Builder
description: Adds a zombie could place blocks to reach target.
body:
Zombie Builder:

It has three building goal.

Vertical building,Horizonal building and Bridge building.

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5a29c7618e713db973021d6d383dc015d242969.png)

![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12c4946723bb0271c065c6c948f3dcafb117fea6.png)

![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50ca7d060dbb3446b6de0af09857e58a44ab33d2.png)

Rotten Dirt:

Disappear after a period when placed.

![4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dfa435af86204b05c0afd82f14b56adf2de42653.png)
## Recommendation:
This mod is designed for certain Zombie Apocalypse Modpack. 
And some of its path-building logic is based on the ability of monsters to break blocks.
Therefore, I recommend using it together with mods that allow monsters to break blocks.

## Modpack Usage
✅ There is no limits to be in any modpack!
